evidence_authority.validation: GitHub Checks and executed local commands

tasks.title: Program Ledger and Legacy Quality Baseline
purpose: inventory entrypoints, domains, rules, templates, artifacts, evaluators, and consumers
record current defects and unsupported claims
establish the legacy quality baseline without claiming improvement

tasks.title: Canonical Intake and Routing Foundation
purpose: define route decisions and domain adapter boundaries

tasks.title: Domain Quality Contract Foundation
purpose: separate required, optional, conditional, forbidden, and clarification semantics
define trust boundaries and output obligations

tasks.title: Executable Rule Manifest Foundation
purpose: define applicability, carriers, validators, mutations, diagnostics, and gates
distinguish prose-only, prompt-only, validated, and enforced states

tasks.title: Thin Template and Traceability Foundation
purpose: separate presentation authority from contract and rule authority
trace output sections to inputs, rules, or obligations

tasks.title: First Domain Quality Pack
purpose: create the first complete domain quality pack
establish development, release, and regression corpora

tasks.title: Native Quality Kernel
purpose: implement rule coverage and template traceability
implement mutation execution and metric aggregation

tasks.title: Model Profiles and Risk-Tiered Semantic Evaluation
Quality Delta and Migration Promotion Gate
purpose: compare legacy and candidate pipelines using held-out evidence
establish Migration Promotion Gate as sole transition authority

tasks.title: First Domain Cutover
purpose: route the first domain through the new path
remove compatibility code only after new_only

tasks.title: Second-Domain Generality Proof
purpose: prove the architecture is not overfit to repo_review
prevent domain-specific assumptions from becoming global

tasks.title: High-Risk Image Quality Pack and Selective Shadow
purpose: implement selective shadow and rollback evidence

tasks.title: Remaining Domain Migration Program
purpose: require one quality pack and Quality Delta evidence per promotion

tasks.title: General Fallback Migration and Legacy Retirement
purpose: verify routing ambiguity and fallback behavior
retire legacy paths only when safe
